parsedContent.feedback: Excellent answer! You have provided three effective methods to prevent soil erosion, and your explanations are clear and concise.
parsedContent.correctedAnswer: Make terracing - flat platforms cut into hillsides to slow down running water. Afforestation - planting trees on hills and mountains, which hold soil in place with their roots and reduce the speed of water. Shelter cover - planting grass or trees, which hold the soil firmly in place with their roots, or doing mulching - covering soil with plant material to reduce the impact of rainfall.
